title: lastrea subquinquefida
intro: Lastrea subquinquefida, also known as the five-lobed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lastrea subquinquefida include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea subquinquefida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as skin infections and respiratory issues.
